description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:8 Docker image with a cache of node_modules/ and a global before_script that runs npm install. Define three stages: test, build, and deploy. In the test stage add a test job that executes npm install -g codecov, then npm run lint, then npm test && codecov --token=731120e2-5bab-4af3-84dc-787ed80b6980, and runs on any branch. In the build stage add a build job that runs npm run build after the before_script. In the deploy stage add a deploy_staging job targeting the staging environment at https://deco-stage.herokuapp.com/, which runs only on the sit_uat_react and master branches and executes npm run build, configures git user.email "kuypplan@gmail.com" and user.name "Deco A5", adds and commits all changes with message "automated deployment", adds a Heroku remote using the provided credentials, and force‑pushes the HEAD to the Heroku master branch.
